text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, the academy is holding a lesson for
Umamusume children so they can get some
firsthand experience racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower and Sakura Bakushin O have both
been assigned to help out with the event.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Flower! Let's do our best today!
Hey, what's with that worried frown?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With me around, this lesson is bound to be a
great success! The development of these young
disciples will progress at Bakushin pace! On that
you can rest easy!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! I'll do my very best to take on the role of
a dependable older sister—one that they can look
up to as a role model!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member
text_block_list.text:
Everybody, please get ready! The kids will be
here any minute now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the lesson begins. However...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In short! To Bakushin most effectively, it's
essential to move your legs with Bakushin-level
vigor...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child A
text_block_list.text: Ummm, I don't really get what you're saying...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! My apologies! Perhaps my explanation was
a little too Bakushin for you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let me put it a different way! Moving your legs
with Bakushin-level vigor means putting Bakushin
into them as you kick off from the ground during
each stride...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child A
text_block_list.text: Y-you just said the same thing again...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, this is the ramp where we do incline
training...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child B
text_block_list.text:
She's around the same height as us. Maybe she's only a
little older than we are?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child C
text_block_list.text: What if I'm actually faster than her? Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask Nishino Flower and Sakura Bakushin O
about their groups during break time, but things
don't appear to be going well.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My Bakushin spirit must have been so
overwhelming! They were too awestruck to
comprehend what I was saying! Ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The kids in my group didn't really listen to me at
all... What should I do?
choice_data_list: You two should go all out in a partner run.
You should teach the kids together.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Genius! With both our spirits burning at full
Bakushin, the resulting Bakushin inferno of
passion is sure to get through to them!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: D-do you think that will work?
choice_data_list: Show them what a big sis is made of.
Show them what a big sis is made of.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...All right, we'll give it a try! Let's do this,
Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child A
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa! That was just like a real race! So that's
what Bakushin is!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child B
text_block_list.text:
You're so fast for your size! I can't run anything
like that!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm sure all of you will be able to run even
faster someday.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child C
text_block_list.text: Really?! I wanna run just like you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower and Sakura Bakushin O
successfully convey their passion through their
race, and the special lesson becomes an
unforgettable memory for the children.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Genius! We can ignite the Bakushin in their hearts
if we combine our own Bakushin passion together!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But... do you think they'll listen to me?
choice_data_list: That's what Bakushin O is here for.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! Allow me to take point and draw their
attention! They'll be so enraptured that they'll
listen to your every word!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
A-all right! I'll place my trust in the two of you.
Let's do our best!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Therefore! To achieve optimal Bakushin, you must
prepare adequately and hit Bakushin-levels of
acceleration when the time is just right!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child A
text_block_list.text: Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, it takes time for you to reach top speed even
after you start accelerating.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's why you have to judge the timing of your
final spurt so that you're running your fastest in
the decisive moment of a race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child A
text_block_list.text: Oh... I think I get it now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oho! A perfectly executed Bakushin assist! Nicely
done, Flower! You made it even easier to
understand!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child B
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you sounded like a teacher just now... You
might be small, but you're just like a big sister!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That she is! Flower is both exemplary and
studious!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-you're exaggerating...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By combining their teaching styles, Nishino
Flower and Sakura Bakushin O successfully make
the special lesson an unforgettable memory for
the children.
